_comment: Components shipped inside the offline-nano APK. Manifests are trimmed to only include these IDs, and matching binaries are downloaded from bannerhub-api GH Releases at build time into assets/local-mirror/components-cdn/. In-app menus only show what is bundled.
_target_branch: V5 (gamehub-5.x). BannerHub 3.7.5 = 5.3.5. Static catalog is V5-native; V6 reshape does not apply here.

box64_manifest._comment: Box64/Fex x86_64 emulator binaries. Includes install-script-required Fex-20251025 (id=345).

dxvk_manifest._comment: DXVK x64 + a couple arm64ec kept for future arm64x container imports. Includes install-script-required dxvk-2.3.1-async (id=25).

vkd3d_manifest._comment: VKD3D-Proton x64 + arm64ec. Includes install-script-required vkd3d-2.12 (id=7).

drivers_manifest._comment: Qualcomm Adreno (closed) + Turnip (open Mesa) + Snapdragon Elite. Includes install-script-required turnip_v25.0.0_R1 (id=48).

steam_manifest._comment: Empty — offline users never sign into Steam. steamClient default stubbed in getDefaultComponent override.

libraries_manifest._comment: All 117 entries (winetricks-style installers, ~1 MB total). Cheap to include.

games_manifest._comment: All *_Settings entries <1 MB plus base.tzst (id=8). Wine container archives in this manifest are skipped — containers section below handles those. Excluded IDs 236 (Torchlight II), 291 (WRC 9), 310 (Resident Evil 3) — catalog references them but binaries were never uploaded to GH Releases (404).

containers._comment: Wine/Proton containers from simulator/v2/getContainerDetail/<id>. Bundling fetches both the wine archive AND the sub_data (wineprefix) for each id.

imagefs._comment: Shared Linux rootfs (Firmware 1.4.1). Required for any container to boot.
